title: Jurisdiction Inventory Envelope
description: Canonical SSOT envelope for jurisdiction counts. Emitted by pipeline.shared.compute_jurisdiction_inventory and published to asym-intel-main:docs/assets/data/jurisdiction-inventory.json. Consumers (Advennt homepage, commons cross-monitor, Advennt /jurisdictions/, methodology) MUST derive counts from this envelope — directly or via the published artefact. See BRIEF-L4-ENGINE-JURISDICTION-INVENTORY-SSOT.md.

as_of.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the scan.

total_baselined.description: Count of jurisdictions with any baseline data (sum of baseline_in_progress + baseline_complete + published). Excludes stubs.

total_published.description: Count of jurisdictions live on the Advennt site (status=published).

total_advennt_live.description: Count of jurisdictions in scope for the Advennt monitor (in_advennt=true). Includes non-stub baselines whether published or not.

total_baseline_complete.description: Count of jurisdictions whose baseline ran end-to-end (status in {baseline_complete, published}). Used by methodology surface.

by_jid.description: Per-jurisdiction breakdown keyed by JID (uppercase ISO-3166-1 alpha-2, or extended code like CA-ON).

publication_gate.description: Name of the first failing publication gate (e.g. 'schema_valid'), or null if all gates pass / no gate block exists / status=published.

warnings.description: Best-effort messages emitted when the function encountered partial repo state. Never causes the function to raise (PI-1 graceful-fallback).
